allow: PowerShell($p = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=33748"; "EXE: $\($p.ExecutablePath\)"; "CWD: $\($p.CommandLine\)"; ""; "--- working dir from handle ---"; try { \(Get-Process -Id 33748\).Path } catch {})

PowerShell($h = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3939 -State Listen | Select-Object -First 1\).OwningProcess; Get-Process -Id $h | Format-List Path,StartTime,MainModule; "--- env via wmic ---"; \(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=$h"\).CommandLine)

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3939/preview/ktmyr-usim-self-main-compare-desktop.html" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "--- HEADERS ---"; $r.Headers | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String; "--- TOP 600 chars ---"; $r.Content.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(600, $r.Content.Length\)\))

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3939/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5 -ErrorAction Stop; $r.Content.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(800,$r.Content.Length\)\) } catch { "ROOT: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; ""; "--- try /api/info ---"; try { \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3939/api/info" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3 -ErrorAction Stop\).Content } catch { $_.Exception.Message })

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3747 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; netstat -ano | Select-String ':3747' | Select-Object -First 2)

PowerShell(Start-Process powershell.exe -ArgumentList '-NoProfile','-ExecutionPolicy','Bypass','-File','D:\\SYS_v4\\scripts\\supervisor.ps1' -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 10; netstat -ano | Select-String ':\(3747|3939\) ' | Select-Object -First 6)
Bash(cp -r kds kds-rules scripts figma-change-tracker bridge-server.js CLAUDE.md README.md package.json package-lock.json d:/SYS_v4/kds-v4/)
